title: War in the Middle East: Trump faces backlash as endgame undefined
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

05:58 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 15:18
summary: President Donald Trump on Monday pushed back against mounting criticism that he hasn't done enough to explain why it was necessary to start a war with Iran now or to articulate his vision for an endgame to the escalating conflict. Trump also seemed to leave open the possibility for a more extensive US military involvement. FRANCE 24's International Affairs Commentator Douglas Herbert tells us more.
